name: 向量进阶
subject: math
curriculum_points: understand the significance of all the symbols used when the equation of a straight line is expressed in the form r = a + tb
determine whether two lines are parallel, intersect or are skew
find the perpendicular distance from a point to a line, from a point to a plane, and between two skew lines
find the angle between two lines, between a line and a plane, and between two planes
find the intersection of a line and a plane, and of two or three planes

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 向量可视化：拖动端点观察向量变化
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
